description: Manages the bleeding out state for downed leaders in tactical combat. Handles countdown timer, UI icon display, death on timeout, and stabilization mechanics.

fields.name: Tile
fields.description: Reference to the tile where the bleeding leader is located (inherited from TileEffectHandler)

fields.name: RoundsRemaining
fields.description: Current countdown of rounds until death. Decremented each round in OnRoundStart

fields.name: InitialRoundsParam
fields.description: Constructor parameter stored, initial round count passed during construction

fields.name: Template
fields.description: Reference to BleedOutTileEffectTemplate containing configuration (sounds, initial rounds, etc.)

fields.name: BleedingLeader
fields.description: Reference to the leader who is bleeding out

fields.name: WorldSpaceIcon
fields.description: UI element displaying remaining rounds above the bleeding leader

fields.name: PreviousTileOccupancyState
fields.description: Cached tile occupancy state from before bleeding started, restored on removal

template_fields.name: InitialBleedRounds
template_fields.description: Number of rounds the leader has before death (copied to Leader+0x78 on init)

template_fields.name: TickSound
template_fields.description: Sound played each round when the countdown decrements

template_fields.name: StabilizeSound
template_fields.description: Sound played when leader is stabilized

template_fields.name: DeathSound
template_fields.description: Sound played when countdown reaches zero and leader dies

leader_fields.name: HealthStatus
leader_fields.description: Current health status of the leader

leader_fields.name: Actor
leader_fields.description: Reference to the tactical Actor component

leader_fields.name: Statistics
leader_fields.description: Statistics tracking object for mission outcomes

leader_fields.name: BleedRoundsRemaining
leader_fields.description: Stored bleed countdown value from template, reset to 0 when effect removed

methods.name: .ctor
methods.description: Constructor initializing the handler with round count and template reference

methods.name: OnAdded
methods.description: Called when effect is added to tile. Sets leader HealthStatus to BleedingOut (1), stores initial rounds, creates UI icon, subscribes to mission events

methods.name: OnRoundStart
methods.description: Called each round. Decrements countdown, updates UI. If rounds reach 0, kills leader and removes effect. Otherwise plays tick sound

methods.name: OnRemoved
methods.description: Cleanup handler. Resets leader's bleed rounds to 0, validates health status, restores tile occupancy, removes UI icon, unsubscribes from events

methods.name: OnMissionPreFinished
methods.description: Mission completion handler. If objectives succeeded (state==2), auto-stabilizes leader. Otherwise kills leader. Always removes tile effect

methods.name: StabilizeLeader
methods.signature: void StabilizeLeader(Actor stabilizer, bool removeEffect, bool playSound)
methods.description: Stabilizes the bleeding leader. Sets HealthStatus to Stabilized (2), plays sound, tracks statistics, invokes OnStabilized event

events.name: TacticalManager.OnBleedingOut
events.description: Delegate invoked when bleeding status changes, with remaining round count

events.name: TacticalManager.OnStabilized
events.description: Delegate invoked when a bleeding leader is stabilized

events.name: TacticalManager.OnPreFinished
events.description: Subscribed to handle automatic stabilization/death on mission end

key_discoveries.detail: Leader death is triggered via virtual call at vtable+0x448 when countdown reaches 0 or mission fails
If primary objectives are completed successfully (state==2), bleeding leaders are automatically stabilized rather than killed
Tile is marked as temporarily occupied while leader bleeds; original state cached at +0x40 and restored on removal
Setting HealthStatus to BleedingOut (1) or Dead (3) unlocks an achievement via AchievementManager.Unlock
Stabilization is tracked via UnitStatistics.TrackStabilized with MissionResult=3, recording both the stabilized leader and stabilizer
BleedingWorldSpaceIcon displays countdown via UITacticalHUD.AddBleedingWorldSpaceIcon, updated each round with remaining count
Three distinct sounds at Template offsets: TickSound (+0xbc) per round, StabilizeSound (+0xc4), DeathSound (+0xcc)
OnRemoved logs error if leader still has HealthStatus==1 (BleedingOut) when effect is removed, then force-stabilizes
